meaning: adj.(意大利)特伦托城的,(天主教)特伦托主教会议的
examples: In 2007 Benedict cleared the way for wider use of the old, Tridentine Latin mass.
The Tridentine rite includes an Easter prayer for the conversion of Jews that has been amended but never dropped.
In the decades that followed, the so-called Tridentine Rite fell out of use almost entirely.
